formId.description: Form ID (e.g. aSAvYreNzVEkrWg5Gdcvg). Choose from the list, or specify an ID using an expression.

dataPropertyAttachmentsPrefixName.description: Prefix for name of the binary property to which to write the attachments. An index starting with 0 will be added. So if name is "attachment_" the first attachment is saved to "attachment_0"

version.description: Attachment size to retrieve, if multiple versions are available

selectMask.description: Comma-separated list of wildcard-style selectors for fields that should be treated as multiselect fields, i.e. parsed as arrays.

numberMask.description: Comma-separated list of wildcard-style selectors for fields that should be treated as numbers

reformat.description: Whether to apply some reformatting to the submission data, such as parsing GeoJSON coordinates
